response.overview: Evanescence – Live at Pinkpop 2003 captures the band at the height of its breakthrough, delivering a dark, dramatic set built around Amy Lee’s commanding voice, heavy guitars and gothic atmosphere. Songs from Fallen, including “Going Under,” “Everybody’s Fool” and “Bring Me to Life,” are performed with raw urgency and youthful intensity.
response.title: Evanescence - Live at pinkpop 2003
